hero.title: Resume
hero.subtitle: A quick look at my experience, skills, and education.

bullets: Established a standardized design system that improved cross-team alignment, reduced UX debt, and enabled faster iteration across multiple ENMAX digital products using Figma MCP, GitHub Copilot, and Claude to increase documentation efficiency by 10x.
Achieved full WCAG AA contrast compliance across ENMAX design system through comprehensive component audit and rebuild, introducing dark mode as an accessibility feature.
Positioned ENMAX's digital products for compliance with emerging Canadian accessibility regulations, reinforcing brand credibility and user trust across digital touchpoints.

Designed a solar education page on enmax.com for Alberta's competitive energy market, translating customer feedback into installation guidance and driving conversions to ENMAX's vetted installer portal.
Conducted user research for regulated power services, surfacing insights that informed enmax.com form design.

Developed a branded content design system and rolling planning calendar, standardizing templates, posting cadences, and content objectives into a scalable, handoff-ready system for company leadership.
Designed social media and email templates alongside structured member portal content architecture, establishing consistent visual identity and a high-value onboarding experience.
Implemented Google Analytics across Avid Learner's website and built a recurring month-over-month analytics reporting template, enabling data-informed content decisions.
Converted Avid Learner's Instagram to a business account and established a branded content presence on LinkedIn, expanding the organization's digital reach across platforms.

education.credential: Diploma, User Experience / User Interface Design

projects.title: Trumi
projects.subtitle: Growth That Feels Like You
bullets: Led end-to-end UX and product design for a live-deployed self-growth app, from a 34-participant research study and brand identity to a shipped React prototype featuring values-based onboarding, an AI chatbot (Groq), and a layered character customization system.
Directed all front-end implementations without a coding background by using Claude and Figma MCP as a design-to-code pipeline, personally owning full delivery from Figma to production.
Translated user research revealing guilt and pressure as the primary barriers to goal-tracking into a guilt-free emotional design system, a deliberate product POV embedded at every touchpoint.
